segments.text: Then all the children of Israel went out, and the congregation was gathered together as one man, from Dan even to Beer-sheba, with the land of Gilead, unto the LORD in Mizpeh.
And the chief of all the people, even of all the tribes of Israel, presented themselves in the assembly of the people of God, four hundred thousand footmen that drew sword.
Now the children of Benjamin heard that the children of Israel were gone up to Mizpeh.
Tell us, how was this wickedness?
segments.speaker: Children of Israel

segments.text: And the Levite, the husband of the woman that was slain, answered and said,
I came into Gibeah that belongeth to Benjamin, I and my concubine, to lodge.
segments.speaker: Levite

footnotes: the Levite: Heb. the man the Levite

segments.text: And the men of Gibeah rose against me, and beset the house round about upon me by night, and thought to have slain me: and my concubine have they forced, that she is dead.
segments.speaker: Levite

segments.text: And I took my concubine, and cut her in pieces, and sent her throughout all the country of the inheritance of Israel: for they have committed lewdness and folly in Israel.
segments.speaker: Levite

segments.text: Behold, ye are all children of Israel; give here your advice and counsel.
segments.speaker: Levite

segments.text: We will not any of us go to his tent, neither will we any of us turn into his house.
segments.speaker: People of Israel

segments.text: And the children of Israel arose, and went up to the house of God, and asked counsel of God,
Which of us shall go up first to the battle against the children of Benjamin?
segments.speaker: Children of Israel

segments.text: Shall I go up again to battle against the children of Benjamin my brother?
segments.speaker: Children of Israel

segments.text: Then all the children of Israel, and all the people, went up, and came unto the house of God, and wept, and sat there before the LORD, and fasted that day until even, and offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before the LORD.
Shall I yet again go out to battle against the children of Benjamin my brother, or shall I cease?
segments.speaker: Children of Israel

segments.text: Go up; for to morrow I will deliver them into thine hand.
segments.speaker: God
